h1: Roof Colors: Browse Every Color, By House Style
meta_title: Roof Color Galleries · Real Florida Homes (2026)
meta_description: Every roof color, with real Florida homes broken down by architectural style. The shingles that get each look, side-by-side siding pairings, and a free visualizer.
hub_intro: Browse every roof color in one place. Each color opens to a gallery of real-home examples grouped by architectural style — modern, modern farmhouse, ranch, craftsman, coastal, and traditional — along with the shingles that match the look and the siding colors that pair best.
